name: 生物大分子
subject: biology
domain_name: 分子与细胞 / Molecules & Cells / Molecules & Cells
curriculum_points: HS-LS1-6: Construct and revise an explanation based on evidence for how carbon, hydrogen, and oxygen from sugar molecules may combine with other elements to form amino acids and/or other large carbon-based molecules.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「生物大分子」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-LS1-6: Construct and revise an explanation based on evidence for how carbon, hydrogen, and oxygen from sugar molecule…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。
